title: Micromeles vestita
taxonomy: Micromeles vestita is classified within the family Rosaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the rose family. Within this family, Micromeles vestita belongs to the genus Micromeles, which is a small genus of deciduous shrubs native to East Asia. The genus Micromeles is further divided into two species, with Micromeles vestita being one of them. This classification indicates that Micromeles vestita shares characteristics with other members of the Rosaceae family, such as having rose-like flowers and similar leaf morphology. The classification of Micromeles vestita also suggests its evolutionary relationships with other species within the family.
